posts.text:
Senator Rand Paul gets Donkey of the Day for holding a grudge after Senator Mullins told the media that he understood why Paul was attacked by his neighbor during a DHS nomination meeting. Sen. Paul, you’ve got smoke with the wrong person, and we don’t have time for this right now… 🤨 Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.
